topics.title: Brain Network Connectivity and Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how structural and functional connectivity shape brain network dynamics across human and nonhuman primates. It also includes work on individualized parcellation, thalamic connectivity, and altered network states in consciousness and anesthesia.

topics.title: Brain Development Across Age and Birth Contexts
topics.description: This cluster focuses on normative and atypical brain development across infancy, childhood, adolescence, and aging, with emphasis on age-related and sex-related differences. It also includes outcomes linked to preterm birth and neonatal brain development.

topics.title: Deep Learning for Brain MRI Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on MRI-based brain imaging with emphasis on automated segmentation, structural reconstruction, and high-resolution quantitative analysis. It also includes work on deep learning models and tool pipelines for robust processing of human brain anatomy and white matter.

topics.title: Adolescent Depression, Trauma, and Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on depressive and anxiety-related psychopathology in adolescents, with emphasis on trauma, resilience, and suicidal ideation. It also links these themes to brain connectivity and white matter findings in major depressive disorder and related disorders.

topics.title: Brain Aging and Alzheimer Disease Biomarkers
topics.description: This cluster centers on biomarkers and imaging markers of brain aging and Alzheimer disease, including amyloid, tau, and brain age measures. It also links these markers to cognitive decline, cognitive impairment, and neurodegenerative disease progression.

topics.title: Visual Imagery and Neural Representation in fMRI
topics.description: This cluster focuses on how visual imagery, attention, and memory relate to neural correlates and representations in the human visual cortex. Studies use fMRI and MVPA to examine encoding, working memory, and episodic recall across visual brain regions.

topics.title: Neurophysiology, Connectivity, and Cognitive Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on electrophysiological and imaging measures used to study brain function, connectivity, and oscillatory dynamics. It also includes applications to cognition and neurological or psychiatric disorders such as epilepsy, Parkinson, Alzheimer, and ADHD.

topics.title: Neural correlates of emotion and social processing
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain systems support emotion regulation, reward, fear, empathy, and related social-cognitive processes across anxiety, depression, and stress. It also includes studies of self-related and interoceptive mechanisms underlying affective symptoms and decision making.

topics.title: fMRI Prediction and Reproducibility Methods
topics.description: This cluster centers on fMRI-based prediction, biomarkers, and brain-behavior relationships, often using machine learning and large datasets. It also emphasizes reproducibility, retest reliability, and methodological evaluation across task and movie-watching paradigms.

topics.title: Neural Basis of Language and Auditory Processing
topics.description: This cluster centers on how language, speech, and auditory processing are represented in the human brain, including work on comprehension, reading, aphasia, and multilingual speakers. It also includes fMRI-based studies linking neural correlates and language network organization across tasks and populations.

topics.title: Stroke Network Alterations and Recovery
topics.description: This cluster centers on how stroke and related brain lesions alter structural and functional networks, affecting motor, cognitive, and disability outcomes. It also emphasizes predicting recovery and therapy response using lesion- and connectivity-based analyses.

topics.title: Genetic and Neurobiological Psychosis Spectrum
topics.description: This cluster centers on schizophrenia and related psychosis-spectrum disorders, emphasizing genetic architecture, biomarkers, and neuroanatomical heterogeneity. It also includes early psychosis and related diagnostic subtypes across neuropsychiatric disorders.

topics.title: Parkinson Disease Pathology and Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on Parkinson disease and related Lewy body pathology, including iron accumulation, substantia nigra and basal ganglia involvement, and phenoconversion. It also highlights altered connectivity patterns and network-level markers linked to symptoms and treatment response.

topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Infrastructure and Workflows
topics.description: This cluster centers on open science infrastructure for neuroimaging, including BIDS-based data organization, automated pipelines, and collaborative cloud-enabled platforms. It emphasizes tools and workflows that improve interoperability, visualization, and clinically actionable analysis.

keywords: constrained dynamic functional connectivity predicts surgical outcome
eeg base connectome analysis and machine learning predict surgical outcome in pediatric epilepsy
topics.title: Epilepsy Network Localization and Surgical Outcome
topics.description: This cluster centers on epilepsy, especially temporal lobe and pediatric cases, with emphasis on localizing epileptogenic zones and epileptic foci. It also highlights network-based and EEG/SEEG approaches, including connectome analysis and predictive modeling of surgical outcome.

topics.title: Autism Heterogeneity and Brain Development
topics.description: This cluster centers on autism spectrum disorder, autistic traits, and symptom variation across childhood and youth. It emphasizes heterogeneous brain abnormalities and functional or structural developmental differences within clinical ASD groups.

topics.title: Sleep Dynamics, Aging, and Brain Clearance
topics.description: This cluster centers on sleep regulation and its links to fatigue, hypersomnolence, aging, and neurological disease. It also emphasizes dynamic brain-state changes during sleep and glymphatic/CSF-related mechanisms of brain waste removal.

keywords: bold asl base cerebrovascular reactivity mapping
functional and metabolic network signatures of
topics.title: Cerebrovascular and Metabolic Brain Function
topics.description: This cluster centers on how cerebrovascular regulation and brain metabolism interact across resting and challenged states in the human brain. It includes studies of perfusion, cerebrovascular reactivity, and metabolic network signatures under conditions such as glucose loading, ketamine challenge, and altered physiology.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Chronic Pain
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain conditions and how they relate to pain perception, central sensitization, and altered brain responses. It also highlights candidate brain markers and connectivity pathways implicated in human pain and analgesia.

topics.title: Test Cluster
topics.description: This cluster appears to contain a single generic candidate phrase and provides insufficient evidence for a specific neuroscience topic or method. The content is too limited to infer a substantive research focus.
